textByHash.d7721066311c07e290d5ff88e66d6e13cc69fdaa: It seems you're missing out on some valuable experience. Would you like it?
textByHash.d9ca142daf11f8fee50ffe91588699f272571392: Hello. I've found some stuff that I think is yours. You can pay me with cash you're carrying, or I can take payments from your bank. Would you like to buy anything from me?
textByHash.eebff3cd427e34b9eb3f454907aaa6d13e243ec7: You could get your stuff back elsewhere, sure. Now, maybe it'd be free, or maybe you'd have to pay someone, but you'd definitely have to go on a journey to get it back.
textByHash.fc9abb7bf5959f07cf51a20041760095cd610b1c: So I'm earning my fee by saving you a trip. Do you want to have a look?
textByHash.6c48f16cd695c749f1db7c25bec03c06f530d89f: Oh yes, some items do break specially when you're killed by your rivals. And if you die in the deep Wilderness, they vanish altogether.
textByHash.350555f52e7591c11442f036965e288063d2c30d: For a fee, yes. Just show me the broken item.
textByHash.da3272b13b3aaf1a6d25ac90a48b63eb33fe632f: I can lock them to you so they won't vanish on death in deep Wilderness, yes. I'll want some money for my services, though, and you'll need to bring me a Trouver Parchment.
textByHash.ed44498979f7060ec63623332b1fbb85c7f0e598: You'll find her in Ferox Enclave, where people play a game called Last Man Standing. Bring the parchment here, then show me the item you want to lock.
textByHash.71b7ad6954d134d15bf4fe4ef58f4d0d08956aad: Not bad for a human! Okay, show me the item you want to protect, and I'll see what I can do.
textByHash.44277a21e6b5270593d5d1d6847dabc27ea140a2: I can lock that item so that it won't vanish if you die in deep Wilderness, but I'll need a Trouver parchment.
textByHash.7b1527ffd1120905ad401fa577535bca9508086d: You'll find her in Ferox Enclave, where people play a game called Last Man Standing. Bring the parchment here, then show me the item again.
textByHash.539a6eaed62d636d9d5d65b59c576fd56230c004: I can lock that item so that it won't vanish if you die in deep Wilderness. It'll cost you 500,000 coins and a Trouver parchment.
textByHash.68282390027d37016c00aa5ebe93146bbcf148a5: I've locked that item to you so that it won't vanish if you're killed in deep Wilderness. I can unlock it again, returning your parchment and 475,000 coins.
textByHash.0f1c8de07804bf9eff431649a25ba551a32649b7: If you want me to lock an item to you so that it won't vanish if you're killed in deep Wilderness, show me the item.
textByHash.b580fa27e88446a635d27cae0228bcd8ea2a6370: I have something for you. You lost your Echo boots. Would you like it back?
textByHash.0659941c2865fe223e59f1d53876963d408f41a5: Ah! I have something for you. You lost your banner. Would you like it back?
textByHash.64e9c46f3e5a33072079792953b835dbede74365: You seem lost, but luckily I know where to send you. A breach is occurring (single). Another breach is occuring (multi).
